rail.note: Light mode: deeper cream over the cream canvas. Dark mode: deep navy (#0B1522).

fontFamily.fallback: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Text, Segoe UI, sans-serif
fontFamily.note: Space Grotesk is bundled locally at frontend/public/fonts/SpaceGrotesk-Variable.woff2 for offline rendering.

headline.purpose: Meeting titles and primary workspace sections.

body.purpose: Controls, explanation, transcript, and summary prose.

label.purpose: Compact metadata and state labels; uppercase eyebrows use muted ink, never amber.

mono.purpose: Timestamps, models, formats, and technical values.

shadows.name: focus-halo
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus paired with a solid amber outline.

shadows.name: amber-glow
shadows.purpose: Optional warmth behind hero/recording surfaces, echoing the logo arc.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Sidebar, dialog, and panel state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary non-recording action on a screen.

components.name: Recording Button
components.description: Reserved for starting or representing active capture.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting actions in headers, toolbars, and states.

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Quiet warm-cream rail navigation with a clear current state (deep navy rail in dark mode).
components.html: <nav class="ds-rail"><button class="ds-nav">Home</button><button class="ds-nav ds-nav-current">Saved meetings</button><button class="ds-nav">Ask meetings</button></nav>

components.name: Workspace Surface
components.description: A flat bounded reading or tool region, never a decorative nested card.
components.html:
Summary

The conversation remains the primary content.

narrative.overview: A precise desktop workbench with the warmth of the Arivo brand. A warm cream canvas holds the meeting; a navy-inked rail holds tools and state. The visual signature is the Arivo palette — cream canvas, navy ink and structure, scarce golden Arivo Amber accent — set in Space Grotesk with tight geometry and clear state language.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream canvas with a navy-inked utility rail (deep navy in dark mode).
Restrained Arivo Amber reserved for recording, active AI work, and decisive selection.
Flat-by-default surfaces separated by warm tone and one-pixel rules.
Compact controls with generous reading width where content matters.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Arivo Amber appears on no more than 8% of a screen and only for recording, active AI work, or consequential selection.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is warm (cream, taupe, tan). Never introduce cool gray or blue-gray fills.

rules.name: The Two-World Rule
rules.body: Rail and canvas are both warm, separated by tone plus a one-pixel border: deeper cream over lighter cream in light mode, deep navy in dark mode. Ink and structure are navy.

rules.name: The Flat Workspace Rule
rules.body: Static content surfaces do not float.

rules.name: The Product Voice Rule
rules.body: No marketing-scale greetings inside the desktop app.

dos: Use the warm cream canvas and navy rail as the primary compositional structure.
Keep Arivo Amber scarce and tied to real state.
Keep every neutral warm — cream, taupe, tan.
Preserve every local behavior and keyboard path.
donts: Do not use cool gray or blue-gray neutrals; the palette is warm throughout.
Do not spread Arivo Amber onto labels, eyebrows, or decoration.
Do not copy Granola, Codex, or Scoutly assets or exact layouts.
Do not add fake metrics, progress, status, citations, or assistant states.
